headline: A Glimpse Into The Expert Outlook On Workday Through 14 Analysts

summary: Every year, analysts discuss the stocks and sectors they favor for the coming year, often providing price targets for where major indexes might land by year-end. I believe both of these practices are futile. The market is dynamic and ever-changing; the environment can shift on a dime, so don’t get attached to a one-year playbook. Focusing on quarterly trends is a better approach.
